name: Looper LED Feedback - Multitrack
notes:
Modifiers used in this script:
M1 - M8 for assigning controller inputs
M20 is used as a 'ping' to tell feedback reactions to update (its value is the track number which was updated)

name: SELECT LED FEEDBACK INPUTS IN HERE

actions.full_code:
# set number of tracks that will be used for looper feedback
num_tracks = 8
self.looper_found = {i: -1 for i in range(num_tracks)}

# MIDI velocity values
self.recording_led = 15 # Red Full
self.stopped_led = 13 # Red Dim
self.overdubbing_led = 55 # Amber
self.playing_led = 52 # Green
self.set_modifier_value("m1", self.midi_note_ch_0_val_0)

selectionObj.desc: Set the value of a Modifier

parameterObj.name: Modifier
parameterObj.desc: The modifier that will be updated

parameterObj.name: Value To Set
parameterObj.desc: This will be set as the value of the modifier

reaction_action_blocks.notes: Set track 1 Controller Input To Modifier M1

notes:
Select the Controller Input to send LED feedback to for each track in this Reaction mapping. 
Starts from Action Block 2 (track 1). 
Select the controller input in the "Value To Set" option. Configure the Controller Inputs in the Controller Template first so that they appear as options in the "Value To Set" menu

actions.full_code:
track_number = 1
track_number = track_number - 1
self.looper_found[track_number] = -1 # reset looper found check

actions.full_code:
track_number = 1
the_input = self.get_modifier_value("m" + str(track_number))
track_number = track_number - 1
device_number = self.looper_found[track_number]

# MIDI velocity values
recording_led = self.recording_led
stopped_led = self.stopped_led
overdubbing_led = self.overdubbing_led
playing_led = self.playing_led

if (
	track_number < len(self.song().tracks)
	and device_number >= 0
	and device_number < len(self.song().tracks[track_number].devices)
):
	looper_device = self.song().tracks[track_number].devices[device_number]
	state_parameter = looper_device.parameters[1]
	state_parameter_value = int(state_parameter.value)

	if state_parameter_value == 0:
